_comment: Tuning parameters for src/stage2_handoff_review. Edit without touching code. Calibrate after first real-data dry-run.
_exclude_entity_ids_comment: Entities listed here are removed from focal after classify but stay referenceable, so others' handoffs to them still resolve. Use when a single entity's payload is too large for batch budget and you want to skip it from Stage 2 evaluation without editing the CSV.
